## Verification

<!-- How did you verify this change works? -->

- [ ] `bun run lint` passes
- [ ] `bun run build` succeeds
- [ ] `bun run dev` starts without errors
- [ ] Manually tested the affected feature(s) in the browser
- [ ] API response is correct (`curl http://localhost:3000/api`)
- [ ] No regressions in the dashboard, filters, list view, or map view
- [ ] Dataset totals reconcile (if dataset was modified)
